shop.society_trading.banker.description: 出售帮助你管理金钱的工具。
shop.society_trading.bard.description: 出售用于音乐、摄影以及自定义绘画的趣味工具。
shop.society_trading.barkeeper.descripti: 出售食物以及与食物相关的物品。
shop.society_trading.blacksmith.descript: 出售部分种类的金属、锻造模板以及晶球处理工具。
shop.society_trading.witch.description: Sells wands & Crystals of Regret for resetting skill trees.
shop.society_trading.trader.description: Barters for Artisan Machine upgrades & other useful items.
shop.society_trading.farmer.description: 出售肥料、烹饪用品以及其他农用设备。
shop.society_trading.fisher.description: 出售钓鱼竿和升级，还有潜水装备以及工具。
shop.society_trading.leatherworker.descr: 出售皮革装备，如背包和鞍。
shop.society_trading.librarian.descripti: 出售附魔书以及相关工具。
shop.society_trading.master_cultivator.d: 出售贵重作物种子以及果树树苗。
shop.society_trading.mystical_botanist.d: 出售昂贵的游戏后期物品，如家具目录和共享石碑。
shop.society_trading.shepherd.descriptio: 出售与动物相关的设备和一些箱装农场动物。
shop.society_trading.bookseller.descript: 出售各种技能书。仅在每个季节末可召唤。
shop.society_trading.storagesmith.descri: 出售与存储相关的设备。
shop.society_trading.market.description: 根据季节出售基础种子和树苗。
shop.society_trading.carpenter.descripti: 出售用于建造农场的建筑方块和季节性家具。
shop.society_trading.invitations.descrip: Has trades to invite new villagers to your town.
shop.society_trading.guild.description: Sells goods for adventuring and fighting mobs.
shop.society_trading.wanderer.descriptio: The Wandering Trader will visit with an array of furniture and books
shop.society_trading.wandering_baker.des: What strange goods this one sells...
shop.society_trading.wandering_winemaker: Offers seeds from around the globe for starting a vinery
item.society_trading.auto_trader.descrip: Allows you to automatically trade from all unlocked shops. Cannot trade for stock-limited or unlocked trades.
